source.title: 2026 salary resolutions (Town Board agenda packet, Jan 6, 2026) vs 2025 salary resolutions

note: Board-authorized annual base salaries for 2026 compared with 2025. A large jump usually means a promotion or reclassification (the title changes), not a cost-of-living raise. Sewer/Scavenger and purely seasonal/hourly staff are not included on either side.
